content:
UFH Blackboard Login — University of Fort Hare

The University of Fort Hare (UFH) Blackboard portal gives students access to course materials, assignments, announcements, and online tests across the Alice and East London campuses. This page provides the direct login link, a step-by-step guide, and bursary assistance information for UFH students in 2026.

UFH Blackboard Direct Login

🔗 Go to UFH Blackboard Login → blackboard.ufh.ac.za

You will need:
- Your UFH student number
- Your UFH Blackboard password

How to Login to Blackboard UFH — Step-by-Step

  1. Open Google Chrome or Firefox — These are the recommended browsers for Blackboard UFH.
  2. Go to blackboard.ufh.ac.za — This is the official UFH Blackboard login URL.
  3. Enter your student number — Use your full UFH student number as it appears on your student card.
  4. Enter your password — For first-time users, the default password is typically your South African ID number. Change it after your first login.
  5. Click Sign In — Your UFH Blackboard dashboard will display your enrolled modules and upcoming deadlines.

UFH Blackboard Login Troubleshooting

Forgot UFH Blackboard Password

Use the "Forgot Password" link on the UFH Blackboard login page to receive a reset email at your official UFH student email. If you cannot access your UFH email, visit the UFH ICT Department on campus.

📞 UFH ICT Helpdesk: +27 40 602 2011

Account Locked

After multiple failed login attempts, your Blackboard account may be locked. Wait 30 minutes and try again, or contact the UFH ICT helpdesk to unlock your account.

Modules Not Visible

Allow 24–48 hours after registration for your modules to appear in Blackboard UFH. If a module is missing after the start of the semester, contact your faculty office at UFH Alice or East London campus.

Slow Connection / Blackboard Not Loading

UFH students in the Eastern Cape often experience slow or intermittent connectivity. Use UFH campus Wi-Fi when possible, or download the Blackboard Student mobile app for offline access to downloaded course materials.

UFH Blackboard on Mobile

Download the Blackboard Student app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store. Log in with your UFH student number and Blackboard password to access your modules on your phone.

2026 Bursary Assistance for UFH Students

The University of Fort Hare serves students from some of South Africa's most historically disadvantaged communities. Many UFH students rely on financial aid to complete their degrees — and 2026 bursary opportunities are available right now.

StudyBuddy helps UFH students navigate the funding landscape:

  • 📋 NSFAS assistance — Help with NSFAS applications, appeals, and financial exclusion at UFH
  • 🌍 Eastern Cape provincial bursaries — Funding available for Eastern Cape students in education, health, and agriculture
  • 💼 Corporate bursaries — Funded opportunities in law, social work, agricultural sciences, and business for UFH students
  • 🎓 UFH-specific scholarships — Merit and need-based funding within UFH's own financial aid office
  • ⏰ Apply early for 2026 — Key bursary deadlines fall between March and June 2026

👉 Find 2026 bursaries for UFH students →

👉 Get 24/7 AI academic support from StudyBuddy →

⚠️ Disclaimer: StudyBuddy is an independent student support platform. We are not officially affiliated with the University of Fort Hare (UFH) or Blackboard Inc. All UFH trademarks belong to their respective owners. Your data is protected under POPIA and is only used to facilitate bursary assistance.

faqs.question: What is the UFH Blackboard login URL?
faqs.answer: The UFH Blackboard login URL is blackboard.ufh.ac.za. Open this page in Google Chrome or Firefox, enter your UFH student number and password, and click Sign In.

faqs.question: What is the default password for UFH Blackboard?
faqs.answer: For first-time users, the default UFH Blackboard password is typically your South African ID number. You should change this after your first successful login.

faqs.question: Does UFH Blackboard work for both the Alice and East London campuses?
faqs.answer: Yes. UFH Blackboard at blackboard.ufh.ac.za serves students at both the Alice (main) campus and the East London campus. Your student number and login credentials are the same regardless of campus.

faqs.question: What bursaries are available for University of Fort Hare students in 2026?
faqs.answer: UFH students can apply for NSFAS, Eastern Cape provincial bursaries, and corporate bursaries in law, social work, agricultural sciences, and education. StudyBuddy helps UFH students identify and apply for these opportunities before 2026 deadlines.

faqs.question: How do I contact UFH ICT for Blackboard support?
faqs.answer: Contact the UFH ICT helpdesk at +27 40 602 2011. You can also visit the ICT department in person at the Alice or East London campus with your student card.
